familyMembers.name: Bruce Wallace
familyMembers.notes: Canadian citizen by birth. Ontario birth registration #026921. Lived at 1501 Farwell St, Saginaw. Warehouse Manager in furniture industry. In U.S.A. for 50 years per death cert. Informant on death cert: W.G. Wallace (same address).
